标题: BV 2026ss early spring new color-blocked zip-up stand collar knitted sweater. Featuring color-blocked design with zipper, made with Japanese imported automatic knitting machine for tight stitching. The fit can be slim or loose, comfortable and breathable. Unisex style, available in sizes S-XL.

BV geometric jacquard round neck knitted sweater, made of imported premium blend of cashmere and wool knit fabric, soft and fluffy with a warm and skin-friendly touch. It offers excellent warmth and breathability, suitable for daily wear in slightly cool weather without feeling stuffy or sticky. The classic round neck design is accented with red and grey contrasting zigzag knitted edges, adding a sleek and eye-catching detail to the simple silhouette. The sweater is adorned with geometric jacquard patterns in grey and red, creating a uniform and three-dimensional texture that breaks the monotony of solid colors and adds an artistic touch to the overall look. Sizes available: S-XL. S: Bust 112cm, Shoulder 47cm, Length 66cm. M: Bust 116cm, Shoulder 48cm, Length 68cm. L: Bust 120cm, Shoulder 49cm, Length 70cm. XL: Bust 124cm, Shoulder 50cm, Length 72cm.

BV knitted down jacket, featuring a light luxury and casual style, providing warmth and softness. The low-key fashion staple is designed with functional slanted pockets on both sides, showcasing the brand's identity and high performance. Made with high-quality materials, the jacket contains 90% white duck down and 10% feathers, ensuring a full and fluffy appearance. The slim and stylish design embodies a minimalist aesthetic, offering a lightweight and warm wearing experience. Available in sizes S, M, and L with corresponding measurements.

BV BOTTAGE VENETA Removable Woven Leather Collar Tech Nylon Down Jacket. The core fabric uses high-performance nylon yarns with special twisting and high-density weaving to create a dense windproof barrier. A microporous protective coating ensures lasting water repellency and stain resistance. The lightweight fabric offers industry-leading tear strength while maintaining a silky smooth touch, perfectly balancing outdoor protection with urban comfort.

Filled with premium high-loft down, segmented precisely by 3D quilting to eliminate cold spots and ensure even distribution, achieving optimal warmth and lightness. The removable woven leather collar features evenly cut leather strips handwoven using the brand’s signature warp-weft technique into an elastic 3D grid. Edges are finished with inward-folded core wrapping. All mechanical parts are hidden for a clean collar line.

A two-way zipper runs through the front and side pockets for smooth operation and windproof sealing. The tech nylon lining is treated with anti-static finish to prevent winter discomfort. Ergonomic 3D cuts at the underarms and sleeves allow movement, paired with a slightly tapered waist for a sleek silhouette, enabling seamless transition from outdoor to business settings.

Overall, this jacket integrates tech fabric matrix, handcrafted leather elements, smart wearable structure, and ergonomic tailoring into a versatile system. It honors Italian craftsmanship heritage while pioneering a new paradigm of luxury performance. Sizes: 44-46-48-50.

BV Bottega Veneta woven leather sweater cardigan, crafted from custom ochre fine cashmere yarn. A touch of oatmeal beige draws all eyes, contrasted by caramel brown heart-shaped quilting. Button spacing creates visual breathing, guiding the gaze across staggered buttons. Genuine leather woven hearts align precisely with the elbow’s frequent bend points, adding a gentle filter to every movement. The ribbed knit technique adjusts front and back needle beds to form pronounced horizontal ridges, enhancing dimensionality. Fully hand-knitted; after 72-hour tanning, leather retains its natural grain. Artisans use custom diamond-shaped blades to create slight curved edges on each unit, preventing irreversible fiber stretching during weaving. Edges are hand-oiled with four layers of edge paint, each cooled and polished to achieve ceramic-like hardness and even gloss. Garment undergoes softening and deodorizing wash with professional equipment and detergents, improving feel and appearance. Sizes: S-XL.

BV Bottega Veneta woven leather sweater knit cardigan in custom ochre fine cashmere yarn.  
Rich color, delicate and soft texture, creating pronounced horizontal raised effect with strong three-dimensionality.  
Fully handwoven. Leather tanned for 72 hours, retaining original grain texture.  
Craftsmen use custom diamond-shaped blades to ensure slight curved edges on each unit, preventing irreversible fiber stretching during weaving.  
Edges hand-oiled with four layers of edge paint; each layer cooled to a specific temperature before polishing, resulting in ceramic-like hardness and even gloss.  
Complex craftsmanship with slow production time.  
Garment undergoes washing, softening, and deodorizing using professional equipment and special detergents for deep cleaning and improved feel and appearance.  

Sizes: S-XL

Bottega Veneta BV Intrecciato Woven Leather Jacket. This jacket showcases the brand’s signature Intrecciato weaving technique combined with luxurious leather, embodying a fusion of high-end elegance and avant-garde design. Crafted from premium genuine leather, hand-woven by artisans, each texture reflects the brand’s century-old craftsmanship. The leather is soft yet durable, offering superior quality compared to standard leather goods. Featuring a three-dimensional woven pattern across the entire jacket, every stitch highlights Bottega Veneta’s meticulous attention to detail. The sharp stand collar pairs with a smooth metal zipper for a sleek, polished look. Ribbed cuffs ensure comfort and add depth to the design. From material selection to craftsmanship, this piece carries Bottega Veneta’s luxury DNA, injecting sophistication and individuality into any outfit. Available sizes: 48-58.

BOTTEGA VENETA BV woven leather pocket jacket, made with original German imported fabric featuring wool tech air-layer material for comfort and breathability. Wool tech air-layer fabric, V-shaped patch stitching on the back collar. Luxurious horn buttons, each with unique grain, handcrafted custom buttons with V-shaped stitching, imported machine-made buttonholes, original handmade button wrapping technique. Handwoven leather chest pocket. Double-layered hem design. Sizes: S-XL.

BOTTEGA VENETA BV lambskin woven down vest features high-density warp and weft yarns tightly arranged, creating uniform, fine diamond-shaped textured surface. This structure gives the fabric a silky sheen by increasing warp floats for smoothness and better light reflection. 

The fabric undergoes a cellulose enzyme wash for gentle, even sanding, removing glare by partially abrading fibers to produce matte diffuse reflection. This also adds a fine nap, making the fabric softer, fuller, and more skin-friendly.

Intrecciato, BOTTEGA VENETA’s signature technique, combines meticulous handcraft and precision. Premium soft, elastic lambskin is laser-cut into uniform, smooth-edged narrow strips. Evenness of strips is essential for perfect weaving. Skilled artisans hand-weave these strips, the soul of Intrecciato. 

On the vest, woven leather components (trims, bands, or full front panels) are expertly sewn to the matte taffeta base, creating a complete, dimensional decorative structure.

Filled with 170g of 90% white duck down, carefully selected and treated to prevent down leakage, ensuring excellent warmth and durability.

Available sizes: S-XL.

Leather Jacket - BV Men's New Lambskin Jacket

On the fashion stage, Bottega Veneta is synonymous with understated luxury and exceptional craftsmanship. For the autumn-winter season, the brand launches a new men's lambskin jacket, perfectly blending classic and innovation to offer a fresh fashion experience for quality-conscious men.

Crafted from imported Australian dark green lambskin, the jacket’s soul lies in this unique color. The vintage, mysterious dark green sets it apart from typical black or brown leather jackets, adding depth and individuality. Its subtle sheen changes under different lights, telling a story of time-honored elegance.

The entire jacket features Bottega Veneta’s signature Intrecciato weaving technique, where leather strips are handwoven by skilled artisans. Every texture and weave reflects the brand’s dedication to traditional craftsmanship and supreme quality. This weaving not only creates a unique visual appeal but also ensures softness, durability, and comfort.

Design-wise, it maintains Bottega Veneta’s minimalist style with clean lines and a sharp silhouette that suits various body types, highlighting a man’s confidence and poise. Whether paired with a simple white shirt and dark trousers for business or a casual tee and jeans for everyday wear, this jacket adapts effortlessly.

Bottega Veneta’s autumn-winter men’s lambskin jacket is more than clothing—it’s a masterpiece blending art and fashion, embodying understated luxury. Choosing it means embracing a refined, meaningful lifestyle.

Sizes -

Bottega Veneta BV patch-trimmed velour short-sleeve shirt is made from premium pure cotton, offering a soft, comfortable feel with excellent breathability and drape. The shirt features a clean white base, classic turn-down collar, and matching buttons for a simple, elegant look. Designer details include subtle color-blocked trims on the cuffs and collar, adding understated style. Expert tailoring is evident in the neat stitching, even needle spacing, and secure buttons. BV White Rabbit printed Si-Si short-sleeve T-shirt, made of premium combed cotton jersey. The combed cotton fabric offers excellent moisture absorption, breathability, warmth, durability, softness, and smoothness. The Si-Si print uses a pigment penetration technique, allowing the ink to soak into the fabric fibers rather than just sitting on the surface, resulting in higher durability and a natural, soft visual effect. Ink is evenly applied via screen printing, with controlled ink amount and pressure to ensure clarity and penetration. Sizes: S-XL.

BV White Rabbit print Si-Si short-sleeve T-shirt, made of premium cotton jersey. The cotton fabric offers good moisture absorption, breathability, warmth, durability, softness, and smoothness. The Si-Si print uses a penetration printing technique, allowing the ink to soak into the fabric fibers rather than just sitting on the surface, resulting in higher durability and a natural, soft visual effect. Ink is evenly applied via screen printing, with controlled ink amount and pressure to ensure clarity and penetration. Sizes: XS-L.

BOTTEGA VENETA SS Spring/Summer New Arrival High-weight OS Fit Loose T-shirt. Features a minimalist front design and a wide ribbed crew neck with embroidery. Made from thick, breathable fabric suitable for layering or wearing alone. The OS fit and high-weight material provide structure without clinging, achieving a relaxed, loose silhouette—an iconic BV style. The relaxed cut flatters all body types, delivering a cool, stylish fit. Sizes: S-XXL.

BV Quilted Leather Collar Half-Zip Polo Shirt. Made from 32S double-sided fine cotton fabric, 330g, with washable woven suede front appliqué. Features a half-zip stand collar in a shirt silhouette, fully equipped with matching accessories. Paired with 21S double-spun 1x1 ribbing, 360g. Combed cotton-polyester blended yarn with medium thickness, coarser than regular textures, providing stronger structure and crispness. Double-sided woven technique creates smooth vertical ribs on both sides, no curling, thicker and denser than standard jersey knit. Fabric has strong drape, resists fluttering, ideal for structured cuts. Sizes: S-XL.

BV Bottega Veneta linen tricolor striped knit sweater, crafted from premium linen-cotton blend yarn. The three tones use the brand’s exclusive custom weaving and dyeing process, ensuring exact color match to the original. Made from natural linen, the fabric is lightweight, breathable, and comfortable without heat retention. Details showcase artisanal craftsmanship, featuring custom lacquered three-hole genuine horn buttons, each hand-stitched by artisans. The Merlot red accents add a refined touch, complementing the stripe design. The sweater is meticulously made, with strict control over yarn selection and dyeing to embody Bottega Veneta’s signature refined aesthetic. Stripes are evenly arranged, with perfect knit density to maintain structure while preserving linen’s natural drape. Sizes: S-M-L.

BV Bottega Veneta Ink-Effect Knit Short-Sleeve Polo Shirt, from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection inspired by Venice’s iconic gondolas. This polo features exquisite intarsia craftsmanship, blending premium linen and cotton to create a unique textured effect. The fabric is specially treated to retain linen’s natural feel while enhancing cotton’s comfort. Earth-toned stripes offer a calm elegance, with flowing lines evoking gondola oars gliding on water. The silhouette is sharp with refined shoulder lines and a classic polo hem. Breathable fabric suits spring and summer wear. Details include reinforced collar and cuffs with dense stitching for durability, and natural-material buttons harmonizing with the overall tone. This polo exemplifies Bottega Veneta’s masterful craftsmanship and Italian aesthetics, ideal for casual or business-casual occasions, perfectly embodying the brand’s understated luxury. Sizes: S-M-L.
